name: Form 1120S E-File Extension
description: Automated E-File Extension process for Form 1120-S (S Corporation) - 100% screenshot-based

steps.name: close_popup_if_present
steps.description: Close Add/Remove State popup if it appears

steps.name: click_efile_menu
steps.description: Click E-File in the top menu bar

steps.name: click_submit_electronic_filing
steps.description: Select Submit Electronic Filing Return in popup

steps.name: select_file_extension
steps.description: Select File Extension option

steps.name: click_continue_filing
steps.description: Click Continue on Filing screen

steps.name: click_continue_extension_intro
steps.description: Continue on Extension Intro screen

steps.name: click_continue_s_corp_name
steps.description: Continue on S Corporation Name screen

steps.name: click_continue_address
steps.description: Continue on Address screen

steps.name: click_continue_ein
steps.description: Continue on EIN screen

steps.name: click_continue_calendar_year
steps.description: Continue on Calendar Year screen

steps.name: click_continue_who_signing
steps.description: Continue on Who is Signing screen

steps.name: click_continue_ero_statement
steps.description: Continue on ERO Statement screen

steps.name: click_continue_email_notification
steps.description: Continue on Email Notification screen

steps.name: scroll_extension_payment
steps.description: Scroll down on Extension Payment screen until Continue visible

steps.name: click_continue_extension_payment
steps.description: Continue on Extension Payment screen (after scroll)

steps.name: click_start_alerts
steps.description: Click Start Alerts button

steps.name: handle_alerts_result
steps.description: Check if 'You're Good to Go' or error - different actions

if_false.description: Click Clients button to return (Error case)

steps.name: click_submit_efile
steps.description: Click Submit E-File button if visible

steps.name: click_continue_done
steps.description: Click Continue on Done screen if visible

steps.name: click_continue_state_extension
steps.description: Click Continue on State Extension question if visible

steps.name: click_new_return
steps.description: Click New Return button (Filing Complete screen)

steps.name: close_add_client_popup
steps.description: Close Add Client popup if present
